description.zh-Hans: 在现有图块上生成苔藓、腐蚀、水渍、冰霜、烟熏或积尘，并输出可继续混合的效果遮罩。
description.en: Adds moss, corrosion, damp stains, frost, soot or dust and exposes the generated effect mask.

triggers.zh-Hans: 长苔藓, 砖块腐蚀, 水渍, 冰霜, 积灰, 材质风化
triggers.en: add moss, corrode bricks, damp stain, frost, dust, weather material

exampleUsage.zh-Hans: 将墙壁或石板接入图像端口，选择材质效果并调节覆盖量与缝隙附着。
exampleUsage.en: Connect a wall or flagstone image, choose an effect and tune coverage and edge affinity.
